collectionPaths.label: Collection Paths
collectionPaths.help: Collection path(s) for Shad retrieval (or set SHAD_COLLECTION_PATH env var)

maxChars.label: Max Context Chars
maxChars.help: Maximum characters for the synthesized context brief

timeout.label: Timeout (ms)
timeout.help: Max milliseconds to wait for shad context retrieval

searchMode.label: Search Mode
searchMode.help: Retrieval mode: hybrid (default), bm25, or vector

limit.label: Max Results
limit.help: Maximum documents retrieved per context lookup

minPromptChars.label: Min Prompt Length
minPromptChars.help: Skip auto-recall for very short prompts

cacheTtlMs.label: Cache TTL (ms)
cacheTtlMs.help: Cache shad-context results for repeated prompts

cacheMaxEntries.label: Cache Max Entries
cacheMaxEntries.help: Max cached results to keep in memory

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject collection context on session start

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Export session summaries to the collection after conversations

captureDir.label: Capture Directory
captureDir.help: Collection subdirectory for session capture files

rlmDir.label: RLM Output Directory
rlmDir.help: Vault subdirectory for background RLM outputs

routerEnabled.label: Task Router
routerEnabled.help: Classify prompts into fast/recall/deep lanes to skip unnecessary retrieval

semanticCacheEnabled.label: Semantic Cache
semanticCacheEnabled.help: Cache context results and match by embedding similarity

semanticCacheThreshold.label: Cache Similarity Threshold
semanticCacheThreshold.help: Minimum cosine similarity for a hard cache hit (0.0-1.0)

semanticCacheSoftThreshold.label: Cache Soft Threshold
semanticCacheSoftThreshold.help: Minimum cosine similarity for a soft cache hit

semanticCacheTtlMs.label: Semantic Cache TTL (ms)
semanticCacheTtlMs.help: Time-to-live for semantic cache entries (default: 24 hours)

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.help: OpenAI embedding model for semantic cache

deepWorkflowEnabled.label: Deep Workflow
deepWorkflowEnabled.help: Enable the deep workflow lane (full RLM pipeline for complex tasks)

deepWorkflowSync.label: Deep Workflow Sync Mode
deepWorkflowSync.help: Block the agent until deep workflow completes (otherwise runs async)

deepWorkflowProfile.label: Deep Workflow RLM Profile
deepWorkflowProfile.help: RLM budget profile for deep workflow tasks (fast|balanced|deep)
